glosses.vi: người bán hàng; nhân viên bán hàng

sentences.target: Le vendeur me conseille ce modèle.

translations.fr: Le vendeur me conseille ce modèle.
translations.en: The salesperson recommends this model to me.
translations.es: El vendedor me recomienda este modelo.
translations.de: Der Verkäufer empfiehlt mir dieses Modell.
translations.it: Il commesso mi consiglia questo modello.
translations.zh-Hans: 售货员向我推荐这个型号。
translations.yue: 店員向我推介呢個型號。
translations.pt: O vendedor me recomenda este modelo.
translations.he: המוכר ממליץ לי על הדגם הזה.
translations.vi: Nhân viên bán hàng giới thiệu cho tôi mẫu này.
translations.nl: De verkoper raadt me dit model aan.
translations.hu: Az eladó ezt a modellt ajánlja nekem.
translations.hi: विक्रेता मुझे यह मॉडल सुझाता है.
translations.el: Ο πωλητής μου προτείνει αυτό το μοντέλο.
translations.nb: Ekspeditøren anbefaler denne modellen til meg.
translations.id: Pramuniaga merekomendasikan model ini kepada saya.
translations.sv: Expediten rekommenderar den här modellen till mig.
translations.ja: 店員は私にこのモデルを勧めます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'vendeur' (subject).
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of 'conseille'.
Clitic personal pronoun, 1st person singular (dative); indirect object/recipient of 'conseille'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object ('ce modèle') and an indirect object ('me').
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'modèle'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object (thing advised).

sentences.target: Tu demandes au vendeur une autre taille.
sentences.reading: /ty dəmɑ̃d o vɑ̃dœʁ yn otʁ tɑj/

translations.fr: Tu demandes au vendeur une autre taille.
translations.ipa: /ty dəmɑ̃d o vɑ̃dœʁ yn otʁ tɑj/
translations.en: You ask the salesperson for another size.
translations.es: Le pides al vendedor otra talla.
translations.de: Du bittest den Verkäufer um eine andere Größe.
translations.zh-Hans: 你向售货员要另一个尺码。
translations.ru: Ты просишь у продавца другой размер.
translations.pt: Você pede ao vendedor outro tamanho.
translations.vi: Bạn hỏi nhân viên bán hàng một cỡ khác.
translations.nl: Je vraagt de verkoper om een andere maat.
translations.uk: Ти просиш у продавця інший розмір.
translations.hi: तुम विक्रेता से एक और साइज़ मांगते हो.
translations.el: Ζητάς από τον πωλητή άλλο μέγεθος.
translations.nb: Du ber ekspeditøren om en annen størrelse.
translations.id: Kamu meminta ukuran lain kepada pramuniaga.
translations.sv: Du ber expediten om en annan storlek.
translations.ro: Îi ceri vânzătorului o altă mărime.
translations.da: Du beder ekspedienten om en anden størrelse.
translations.ja: 店員に別のサイズを頼みます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; requests something of someone.
Preposition 'à' fused with definite article 'le' ('à + le'); introduces indirect object.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of 'à' (recipient).
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'taille'.
Attributive adjective; modifies 'taille'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object (thing requested).

sentences.target: Un vendeur prépare les sacs au comptoir.
sentences.reading: /œ̃ vɑ̃dœʁ pʁepaʁ le sak o kɔ̃twaʁ/

translations.fr: Un vendeur prépare les sacs au comptoir.
translations.ipa: /œ̃ vɑ̃dœʁ pʁepaʁ le sak o kɔ̃twaʁ/
translations.en: A salesperson is preparing the bags at the counter.
translations.es: Un vendedor prepara las bolsas en el mostrador.
translations.de: Ein Verkäufer bereitet die Tüten am Tresen vor.
translations.it: Un commesso prepara le borse al bancone.
translations.zh-Hans: 一位售货员正在柜台准备袋子。
translations.yue: 有個店員喺櫃檯準備袋。
translations.pt: Um vendedor está preparando as sacolas no balcão.
translations.vi: Một nhân viên bán hàng đang chuẩn bị túi ở quầy.
translations.nl: Een verkoper maakt de tassen klaar bij de balie.
translations.hu: Egy eladó a pultnál készíti elő a zacskókat.
translations.hi: एक विक्रेता काउंटर पर थैले तैयार कर रहा है.
translations.el: Ένας πωλητής ετοιμάζει τις τσάντες στον πάγκο.
translations.nb: En ekspeditør forbereder posene ved disken.
translations.id: Seorang pramuniaga sedang menyiapkan tas di kasir.
translations.sv: En expedit förbereder påsarna vid disken.
translations.ro: Un vânzător pregătește pungile la tejghea.
translations.da: En ekspedient forbereder poserne ved disken.
translations.ja: 店員がカウンターで袋を用意しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'vendeur' (subject).
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of 'prépare'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive.
Definite article, plural; determiner of 'sacs'.
Common noun, plural; direct object.
Preposition 'à' fused with 'le'; introduces locative phrase.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition; location (locative complement).

sentences.target: Je cherche le vendeur pour payer.

translations.fr: Je cherche le vendeur pour payer.
translations.en: I'm looking for the salesperson to pay.
translations.de: Ich suche den Verkäufer, um zu bezahlen.
translations.pt: Estou procurando o vendedor para pagar.
translations.he: אני מחפש את המוכר כדי לשלם.
translations.vi: Tôi tìm nhân viên bán hàng để thanh toán.
translations.nl: Ik zoek de verkoper om te betalen.
translations.hi: मैं भुगतान करने के लिए विक्रेता को ढूंढ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ψάχνω τον πωλητή για να πληρώσω.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter ekspeditøren for å betale.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter expediten för att betala.
translations.ro: Îl caut pe vânzător ca să plătesc.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter ekspedienten for at betale.
translations.ja: 支払うために店員を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'vendeur'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object.
Preposition introducing a purpose clause ('pour' + infinitive).
Infinitive verb; complement of 'pour' expressing purpose.
